x-enumeration-literals.name: Premium Arrangement
x-enumeration-literals.description: How much, how often, and how premiums are paid.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Coverage Arrangement
x-enumeration-literals.description: Risks/events insured against and the scope/limits of protection.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Exclusion Arrangement
x-enumeration-literals.description: Situations where the insurer will not pay.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Claim Arrangement
x-enumeration-literals.description: How claims are submitted, documents needed, and payout procedures.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Renewal Arrangement
x-enumeration-literals.description: Rules for extending or continuing the policy.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Benefit Arrangement
x-enumeration-literals.description: How and to whom benefits are paid.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Legal & Regulatory Arrangement
x-enumeration-literals.description: Compliance with laws and dispute resolution mechanisms.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Payment Arrangement
x-enumeration-literals.description: Specifies how and when benefits are paid e.g., lump sum, scheduled installments, or direct payment to service providers.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Service Arrangement
x-enumeration-literals.description: Covers non-monetary benefits such as the provision of funeral services, transport of remains, or repatriation, usually via contracted service providers.
